checks.evidence: do not run git add . in this repository. stage exact files only and inspect git diff --cached --stat before commit. treat existing dirty files as user/other-worker state unless the current worker created them in this batch. do not revert unrelated dirty files. if local and upstream branches diverge, do not push until a sync or owner decision is explicit. if a file owned by another worker must change, write a handoff.
